name: Drag reorder with keyboard alternative (Svelte)
algorithm: Pointer drag uses native HTML5 DnD: dragstart records the source index, dragover preventDefaults to allow drop and marks the target, drop moves the item immutably. Keyboard alternative: Space/Enter grabs an item, Arrow keys move it one slot (focus follows via rAF), Escape cancels, Space/Enter drops. Every move emits reorder and is announced on a polite live region.
reduced_motion: Item transition and grabbed scale removed under prefers-reduced-motion; reordering still works without easing.
responsive_behaviour: fluid up to 28rem; full-width stacked rows; no fixed pixel motion
browser_support: All modern browsers; native DnD for pointer, keyboard path needs no DnD so touch/keyboard-only users are covered.
accessibility: Full keyboard reorder alternative; rows operable with role=button, aria-roledescription and aria-grabbed plus position in label; polite role=status live region announces grabs/moves/drops/cancels; drag handle aria-hidden; 44px targets and visible focus.
